collectiondata.overview:
Best Bali Tour Packages From Kolkata

Step into a tropical paradise where pristine beaches, emerald rice terraces, sacred temples, and romantic sunsets create the perfect escape. Travelxploria brings you the Best Bali Tour Packages From Kolkata, thoughtfully designed for honeymooners, families, and leisure travelers seeking a smooth and memorable international holiday. As a trusted international tour operator, we handle everything from flights to sightseeing, so your Bali tour from Kolkata feels effortless from start to finish.

Why Choose a Bali Tour Package From Kolkata

Bali is one of the easiest and most rewarding international destinations from Kolkata. Indian passport holders enjoy visa free entry to Indonesia for up to 30 days, making travel planning simple and stress free. With convenient flight connections from Kolkata via major hubs, Bali remains both time efficient and cost effective for international travel. Booking early helps secure the best Bali tour package price from Kolkata, especially during peak seasons.

Bali offers an unmatched blend of natural beauty and cultural richness. From serene beaches to lush countryside and spiritual landmarks, the island caters to every travel style. A Bali tour package from Kolkata allows you to experience beach relaxation, cultural exploration, shopping, and adventure within a single itinerary.

Ideal for Couples, Families, and Group Travelers

Bali is a favorite destination for honeymooners, families, and even first time international travelers. Couples enjoy private pool villas, candlelight dinners, and scenic viewpoints. Families benefit from safe destinations, flexible sightseeing, and engaging attractions suitable for all age groups. Travelxploria customizes Bali tour packages from Kolkata for couples, families, and groups with personalized planning and on ground support.

Top Bali Tour Packages From Kolkata

The 5 to 7 days Bali tour package from Kolkata is the most popular choice, covering the island’s highlights without rushing the experience. This itinerary typically includes vibrant beach areas, cultural heartlands, and scenic coastal temples. Travelers explore Kuta for lively beaches and shopping, Ubud for rice terraces and temples, and Seminyak for luxury stays and sunsets. Many packages also include a day trip to Nusa Penida, known for dramatic cliffs and turquoise waters.

Best Places Covered in Bali Tour Packages From Kolkata

Ubud is the cultural soul of Bali, famous for traditional art markets, forest temples, and scenic rice fields. Kuta and Seminyak are ideal for beach lovers, offering cafes, shopping streets, and sunset views. Uluwatu Temple and Tanah Lot provide unforgettable cliffside and oceanfront sunset experiences. Nusa Penida adds a touch of adventure with island hopping and panoramic viewpoints.

What Is Included in the Best Bali Tour Package From Kolkata

Most Bali tour packages from Kolkata include return flights, airport transfers, hotel or villa accommodation with daily breakfast, guided sightseeing tours, private transportation, and local assistance. Honeymoon and family packages may also include private pool villas, spa experiences, and customizable sightseeing options.

Best Time to Book Bali Tour Packages From Kolkata

The ideal time to visit Bali is from April to October, when the weather is dry and perfect for beaches and outdoor activities. November to March offers lush landscapes and attractive package deals, making it suitable for budget conscious travelers. Booking during shoulder seasons often gives the best value for Bali tour packages from Kolkata.

How to Book the Best Bali Tour Package From Kolkata

Travelxploria offers transparent pricing, expert guidance, and reliable customer support for booking your Bali holiday. Early bookings, flexible travel dates, and off season travel help secure the best deals. Ensure your passport is valid for at least six months and carry essential travel documents for a smooth journey.

Choosing the Best Bali Tour Packages From Kolkata means choosing comfort, culture, and unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, your Bali trip is not just a holiday, it is a carefully crafted experience designed around you

packages.package_name: Bali Uncovered: Adventure, Tranquility & Tropical Magic
packages.overview:
• Discover the Best of Bali with Travelxploria
  • Bali, the Island of the Gods, is where turquoise waves kiss golden shores and sacred temples whisper tales of centuries past. Travelxploria invites you to explore the island’s vibrant soul—starting in Kuta, Bali’s most energetic beach destination. From sun-soaked lounging and world-class surfing to buzzing nightlife and boutique shopping, Kuta offers the perfect mix of excitement and relaxation. Dive into thrills at Waterbom Bali, one of Asia’s top-rated water parks, or stroll along beachside markets as the sky blazes with a picture-perfect sunset.
  • Venture beyond the coast to uncover Bali’s cultural heart in Ubud—home to lush rice terraces, mischievous monkeys in the Sacred Forest, and artisan villages brimming with traditional crafts and dance. For nature lovers, a trek to the summit of Mount Batur rewards you with a magical sunrise above the clouds, while the rugged beauty of Nusa Penida beckons with crystal-clear waters and dramatic cliffs that defy gravity.
  • Capture breathtaking views at iconic temples like Tanah Lot, perched on the sea, and Uluwatu Temple, set dramatically on a cliff edge with unforgettable sunset vistas. With Travelxploria taking care of every detail—from curated experiences to comfortable stays—your Bali adventure becomes a seamless blend of spiritual discovery, natural beauty, and tropical indulgence.

Begin with a scenic drive to Kintamani, where you’ll enjoy panoramic views of the majestic Mount Batur and its serene lake. Next, explore the cultural heart of Ubud, visiting the famous Monkey Forest, traditional art villages, and vibrant local markets. Enjoy a delicious Balinese lunch overlooking volcanic landscapes, then continue to iconic rice terraces and a coffee plantation for a tasting session. This immersive tour offers a perfect blend of adventure, nature, and authentic Balinese culture.

Get ready for an action-packed adventure as you choose from thrilling activities like jet skiing, parasailing, banana boat rides, and flyboarding. Experience Bali’s coastal beauty and cultural charm with Travelxploria’s seamless service and best-in-class support. Start your day with a delicious breakfast, then head to Tanjung Benoa Beach, famous for its pristine shores and exciting water activities. Next, relax at the breathtaking Pandawa Beach, a hidden paradise with turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs. In the evening, visit the magnificent Uluwatu Temple, perched on a clifftop, offering stunning sunset views over the Indian Ocean. Conclude your day with the mesmerizing Kecak Fire Dance, a spectacular Balinese performance set against the sunset backdrop. Enjoy a hassle-free transfer back to Kuta, ensuring a perfect and memorable Bali experience.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.overview:
• Bali with Travelxploria: A Journey Through Culture, Cliffs & Coastlines
  • Let Travelxploria take you on an unforgettable escape to Bali—where sacred temples, golden beaches, and lush landscapes come together in perfect harmony. Begin your journey at the iconic Uluwatu Temple, perched high on a cliff, where the sun sets behind the sea in a fiery blaze, followed by the spellbinding Kecak Fire Dance performed under the open sky. Capture the spiritual magic of Tanah Lot Temple, a sea temple that appears to float on waves—ideal for photographers and soul seekers alike.
  • In the cultural heart of Ubud, wander through emerald-green rice terraces, encounter playful monkeys in the Sacred Forest, and immerse yourself in traditional Balinese arts, crafts, and cuisine. For the adventurer at heart, a Mount Batur sunrise trek promises a surreal morning above the clouds, with sweeping views from an active volcano.
    Take a day trip to Nusa Penida, Bali’s rugged gem, where dramatic cliffs meet turquoise waters in postcard-perfect harmony. Back in Kuta and Seminyak, enjoy the sun-soaked rhythm of Bali’s coastline—surf the waves, lounge on golden sands, or dive into Waterbom Bali, one of Asia’s top-rated water parks. As night falls, the island transforms into a playground of beach clubs, vibrant bars, and lively street scenes. Don't forget to explore Bali’s local markets and boutique shops—a paradise for those who love to collect treasures along the way.
    With Travelxploria curating each step—cultural experiences, island adventures, and well-earned relaxation—Bali becomes more than a destination; it becomes a memory you'll carry forever.

Upon your arrival at Ngurah Rai International Airport in Bali, you will be warmly welcomed by a Travelxploria representative who will assist you with a smooth transfer to your hotel. As you drive through Bali’s scenic landscapes, catch glimpses of lush rice terraces, traditional Balinese architecture, and coastal beauty. Start your day with a hearty breakfast before embarking on an unforgettable Nusa Penida East Island Tour with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel and ensure a seamless transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this breathtaking island. Upon arrival, our expert guide will take you to Diamond Beach, famous for its white sandy shores and turquoise waters, followed by a visit to Atuh Beach, a secluded paradise surrounded by dramatic cliffs. Next, explore the iconic Tree House (Rumah Pohon) and soak in the panoramic beauty from the Thousand Islands Viewpoint, offering some of the most breathtaking vistas in Bali. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the island’s flavors amid nature’s beauty. As the sun begins to set, unwind on your return journey, followed by a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Embark on a thrilling full-day Mount Batur, Kintamani, and Ubud Adventure Tour that captures the essence of Bali’s natural beauty and cultural heritage. Begin with a scenic drive to Kintamani, where you’ll enjoy panoramic views of the majestic Mount Batur and its serene lake. Next, explore the cultural heart of Ubud, visiting the famous Monkey Forest, traditional art villages, and vibrant local markets. Enjoy a delicious Balinese lunch overlooking volcanic landscapes, then continue to iconic rice terraces and a coffee plantation for a tasting session. This immersive tour offers a perfect blend of adventure, nature, and authentic Balinese culture.

packages.overview:
Imagine touching down on Bali’s sun-kissed shores as the scent of frangipani and sea salt greets you, your heart already racing with the promise of adventure. With Travelxploria orchestrating every moment, you’ll drift from the surf-sculpted waves of Kuta at dawn to the emerald-carpeted rice terraces of Ubud by noon, each transfer handled in comfort and style. Our local guides—steeped in Balinese lore—will lead you through the sacred clifftop temples of Uluwatu and Tanah Lot at sunset, where ancient stone guardians stand watch over the roaring Indian Ocean. As twilight falls, join a hypnotic Kecak fire dance under a starlit sky, then awaken the next day for an exclusive yoga session overlooking Mount Agung’s misty silhouette. We’ll whisk you off to Nusa Penida’s dramatic coastal cliffs for heart-pounding snorkeling with manta rays, before treating you to a private beachside feast of babi guling and sate lilit as the waves lap the shore. From seamless first-class flights and hand-picked boutique villas to insider experiences that dive into Bali’s living traditions, Travelxploria turns your dream of the Island of Gods into a story you’ll treasure forever.

​

Indulge in an unforgettable day of adventure and romance with Travelxploria’s seamless service and best-in-class support. Start your day with a delicious breakfast, then our friendly representative will pick you up for the thrilling Bali Swing experience, where you’ll soar over lush jungles and rice terraces, capturing breathtaking photos. Spend the afternoon at your leisure before heading for an enchanting Sunset Dinner Cruise by Bounty. Sail along the tranquil waters while enjoying a sumptuous buffet dinner, live music, and traditional performances, all set against a magical sunset backdrop. End your day with hassle-free transfers, ensuring a seamless and memorable Bali experience.

Start your day with a seamless hotel pick-up by Travelxploria’s expert team. First, visit the breathtaking Tegenungan Waterfall, a perfect spot for stunning views. Then, explore the lush Tegalalang Rice Fields, where endless greenery creates a serene escape. Wander through the Ubud Monkey Forest and meet its playful macaques before soaring on the Aloha Swing—choose from Chair, Single, or Ship for an unforgettable thrill. Stroll through the vibrant Ubud Village, soaking in its rich culture. Experience Ubud’s beauty in a scenic Jeep ride, guided by experienced team and best on-ground support staff. With smooth pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria ensures a hassle-free adventure—because we always give you the best experience for your tour.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, preparing for an unforgettable Ubud sightseeing adventure.Our dedicated representative will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless start to your journey.Immerse yourself in the artistic soul of Ubud Village, known for its vibrant culture and traditional craftsmanship. Stroll through the lush Tegallalang Rice Terraces, a stunning landscape of cascading greenery. Next, marvel at the majestic views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from the Kintamani Volcano viewpoint, where the breathtaking scenery leaves you in awe. Feel the essence of Bali’s rich heritage and natural beauty at every stop. Capture unforgettable momentsas you explore this enchanting region. As the day draws to a close, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free experience.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.package_name: The Bali Dreamscape: Sun, Sand & Spirituality
packages.overview:
• Imagine awakening in the heart of Bali’s emerald highlands, where Travelxploria greets you with a fragrant offering of frangipani and mango blossoms at your boutique Ubud villa. As dawn breaks, drift into a guided yoga session on your private terrace overlooking the mist-wreathed Tegalalang rice terraces—an experience we’ve arranged with a local master yogi to align your body with Bali’s tranquil rhythms. After a farm-to-table breakfast of tropical fruits and Balinese coffee, our expert cultural liaison leads you through the sacred Monkey Forest, weaving stories of ancient royalty and jungle guardians.
  • Midday brings a personalized art pilgrimage: wander through Ubud Art Village’s hidden ateliers, where village artisans invite you to try your hand at batik painting or wood carving, and select one-of-a-kind treasures as mementos. Then, slip into the serene waters of Pura Tirta Empul’s holy springs for a purification ritual arranged exclusively for our guests—complete with a blessing from a Balinese priest.
  • As afternoon sun gilds the palm fronds, join a private cooking workshop in a traditional teakwood kitchen, mastering the spice-laden secrets of sate lilit and lawar under the guidance of a local culinary family. Your evening unfolds at Ubud Palace, where Travelxploria has secured front-row seats to a mesmer­izing Legong dance beneath lantern-lit eaves. Finally, surrender to a bespoke spa ritual scented with jasmine and sandalwood—our gift to you—before retiring to your villa, lulled by the distant chorus of cicadas and the promise of another unforgettable day. With every detail thoughtfully curated, Travelxploria ensures your Ubud escape is not just a visit, but a living, breathing story.

Witness the iconic Tanah Lot Temple, perched on a rocky outcrop amidst the crashing waves, as the sky transforms into a mesmerizing palette of colors. Capture stunning sunset views and soak in the island’s spiritual essence. After this magical experience, enjoy a hassle-free drop-off at your hotel, ensuring a perfect start to your Bali adventure.

​Experience the breathtaking landscapes and rich cultural heritage of Bali with seamless service and best-in-class support. Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, then set off on an unforgettable adventure with our Travelxploria representative. Take in the stunning views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from Kintamani, a paradise for nature lovers. Feel the adrenaline rush at the Bali Swing, offering panoramic jungle scenery, before exploring the lush Tegalalang Rice Terrace. packages.package_name: Island of the Gods: A Bali Odyssey
packages.overview:
Bali offers a perfect blend of cultural richness and beachside excitement, with Ubud and Kuta as two must-visit destinations. Ubud, the island’s cultural heart, is surrounded by lush rice terraces, ancient temples, and vibrant art markets. Explore the famous Tegalalang Rice Terrace, Ubud Palace, and Monkey Forest, or indulge in a rejuvenating spa experience. In contrast, Kuta is Bali’s energetic coastal hub, known for its golden beaches, world-class surfing, buzzing nightlife, and shopping streets. Whether you seek relaxation in Ubud’s serene landscapes or adventure in Kuta’s lively atmosphere, Travelxploria’s seamless services ensure a hassle-free and unforgettable Bali experience.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast before our knowledgeable representative picks you up for an unforgettable journey. Capture stunning photos at the iconic Handara Gate, known for its majestic Balinese architecture. Finally, immerse yourself in nature’s beauty at Banyumala Twin Waterfalls, a hidden gem with crystal-clear pools perfect for a refreshing dip. After a day of exploration, return to your Kuta hotel with hassle-free transfers, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast before embarking on an unforgettable Nusa Penida East Island Tour with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel and ensure a seamless transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this breathtaking island. Upon arrival, our expert guide will take you to Diamond Beach, famous for its white sandy shores and turquoise waters, followed by a visit to Atuh Beach, a secluded paradise surrounded by dramatic cliffs. Next, explore the iconic Tree House (Rumah Pohon) and soak in the panoramic beauty from the Thousand Islands Viewpoint, offering some of the most breathtaking vistas in Bali. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the island’s flavors amid nature’s beauty. As the sun begins to set, unwind on your return journey, followed by a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

packages.overview:
Bali offers the perfect mix of adventure and relaxation, with Kuta and Nusa Penida as must-visit destinations. Kuta is Bali’s vibrant hotspot, known for its golden beaches, surfing waves, lively nightlife, and bustling markets. It’s the ideal place to soak in the island’s energy. In contrast, Nusa Penida is a natural paradise, home to breathtaking spots like Kelingking Beach, Broken Beach, and Angel’s Billabong, perfect for nature lovers. Whether you seek excitement or serenity, Travelxploria’s seamless service ensures a hassle-free experience, making your Bali journey unforgettable with smooth transfers, expert guidance, and the best travel support.

packages.overview:
Bali, the "Island of the Gods," offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and culture. Kuta is famous for its vibrant nightlife, shopping, and golden beaches, ideal for surfing and sunsets. Nusa Penida boasts breathtaking landscapes like Kelingking Beach, Broken Beach, and Angel’s Billabong, making it a paradise for nature lovers. Meanwhile, Ubud is the heart of Bali’s culture, surrounded by lush rice terraces, sacred temples, and traditional art markets. From thrilling beach activities to serene spiritual retreats, Bali has something for everyone.

​

packages.overview:
Bali, known as the Island of the Gods, is a tropical paradise in Indonesia, famous for its pristine beaches, lush rice terraces, vibrant culture, and spiritual heritage. It offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and luxury, making it a top destination for travelers worldwide. From the iconic temples of Tanah Lot and Uluwatu to the serene landscapes of Ubud, Bali captivates visitors with its natural beauty. The island boasts world-class resorts, beach clubs, and wellness retreats, ideal for honeymooners and luxury seekers. Adventure lovers can enjoy surfing, snorkeling, and volcano trekking, while food enthusiasts can savor authentic Balinese cuisine. With its warm hospitality and enchanting charm, Bali promises an unforgettable experience for every traveler.

​

Upon arrival at Ngurah Rai International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative will greet you warmly and assist with a seamless transfer to your hotel in Kuta. Sit back, relax, and enjoy the scenic drive as our experienced tour guide shares insights about Bali’s vibrant culture. After checking in, spend the rest of the day at your leisure—unwind by the beach, explore the bustling streets, or indulge in local delicacies. Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.overview:
Bali’s Ubud and Kuta offer a perfect blend of culture and adventure. Ubud, the island’s cultural heart, is surrounded by lush rice terraces, ancient temples, and vibrant art markets. Explore the Sacred Monkey Forest, visit the Tegalalang Rice Terraces, or enjoy a traditional Balinese dance performance. In contrast, Kuta is famous for its lively beaches, exciting nightlife, and thrilling water sports. Surf the waves at Kuta Beach, shop at bustling markets, or unwind at a beachfront bar. Whether you seek tranquility in Ubud or excitement in Kuta, Bali offers an unforgettable experience for every traveler.

​

Rise before dawn as Travelxploria’s expert guide and best on-ground support staff ensure a seamless transfer to the base of Mount Batur for an exhilarating trek. Embark on a 2-3 hour ascent through rugged volcanic terrain, guided by our experienced team, as the anticipation builds for the breathtaking views ahead. Reach the summit just in time to witness a mesmerizing sunrise over Mount Agung, with golden hues reflecting on the serene volcanic lake below—a truly unforgettable sight. After soaking in the beauty and capturing stunning photos, descend at your own pace before being comfortably transferred back to your hotel for a well-deserved rest and overnight stay.

Start your day with a rejuvenating Balinese spa session to relax your body. Then, explore Ubud at your own pace, visiting the Ubud Monkey Forest, home to playful macaques. Continue to the 9th-century Goa Gajah, known for its intricate rock carvings, and explore the Komaneka Fine Art Gallery. End the day with a visit to Pura Taman Saraswati Temple before returning to your hotel for an overnight stay.

packages.overview:
Bali’s Ubud and Kuta offer a perfect blend of culture and adventure. Ubud, the island’s cultural heart, is surrounded by lush rice terraces, ancient temples, and vibrant art markets. Explore the Sacred Monkey Forest, visit the Tegalalang Rice Terraces, or enjoy a traditional Balinese dance performance. In contrast, Kuta is famous for its lively beaches, exciting nightlife, and thrilling water sports. Surf the waves at Kuta Beach, shop at bustling markets, or unwind at a beachfront bar. Whether you seek tranquility in Ubud or excitement in Kuta, Bali offers an unforgettable experience for every traveler.

Begin with a scenic drive to Kintamani, where you’ll enjoy panoramic views of the majestic Mount Batur and its serene lake. Next, explore the cultural heart of Ubud, visiting the famous Monkey Forest, traditional art villages, and vibrant local markets. Enjoy a delicious Balinese lunch overlooking volcanic landscapes, then continue to iconic rice terraces and a coffee plantation for a tasting session. This immersive tour offers a perfect blend of adventure, nature, and authentic Balinese culture.

Start your day with an exhilarating adventure as Travelxploria’s representative picks you up from your hotel for a journey to the breathtaking Tegenungan Waterfall, one of Bali’s most picturesque natural wonders. Located just outside Ubud, this majestic cascade is surrounded by lush tropical greenery, offering a refreshing escape into nature. Your adventure begins with a scenic trek down a well-maintained trail, passing through dense foliage and wooden bridges, leading you to the roaring waterfall. Along the way, your guide will share local legends and fascinating insights about this hidden gem. Once you reach the base, take a refreshing dip in the cool, crystal-clear pool, feel the mist on your skin, or capture stunning photographs of the cascading waters against the lush jungle backdrop. After enjoying the serene beauty, hike back up at a leisurely pace, taking in the scenic views before a comfortable drop-off back at your hotel, ensuring an unforgettable experience.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

[{"city":"Ubud","country":"Indonesia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Indonesia/Ubud/1745000524493-AdobeStock_214565906 (1).jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Indonesia/Ubud/1745000524635-AdobeStock_229893163-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Indonesia/Ubud/1745000524867-AdobeStock_424147352-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Indonesia/Ubud/1745000524955-AdobeStock_480822159-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Ubud - Leisure Day ","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Bali’s airport, a warm welcome awaits you from Travelxploria’s representative, ensuring a seamless transfer to your hotel. With the expertise of our experienced tour guide and the best on-ground support staff, your journey begins effortlessly. After check-in, take time to unwind or immerse yourself in the cultural charm of Ubud. Wander through the mystical Ubud Monkey Forest, explore the ancient Goa Gajah (Elephant Cave), or admire the tranquil beauty of Ubud Water Palace. If you're in the mood for entertainment, catch a captivating performance at Paradiso before returning to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

Begin with a visit to the breathtaking Tegenungan Waterfall, where cascading waters create a mesmerizing natural escape. Continue to the Kintamani Highlands, offering stunning views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur. Stroll through the Tegallalang Rice Terraces, a UNESCO-listed marvel of lush, cascading paddies. After a day of discovery, enjoy a seamless transfer back to your hotel for a relaxing overnight stay.​

Get ready for your Bali Safari & Marine Park adventure with Travelxploria’s warm hospitality, as our representative ensures a seamless experience from hotel pickup to an exciting day in the wild. Step into a world where exotic creatures roam freely in carefully designed natural habitats. Embark on a thrilling safari journey, where you’ll encounter majestic lions, tigers, zebras, and rhinos up close. Enjoy interactive animal encounters, feed gentle elephants, and witness the rare Komodo dragons in their enclosures. Be captivated by Balinese cultural performances, including the stunning Bali Agung Show, a theatrical masterpiece blending dance, music, and storytelling. Explore the freshwater aquarium, where exotic marine life thrives. Kids will love the Fun Zone & Water Park, offering endless excitement. As the day winds down, our guide ensures a comfortable drop-off back at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Bali’s incredible wildlife and cultural charm.

​Embark on an exciting adventure with Travelxploria’s seamless transfer to Tanjung Benoa Beach, where you’ll board a glass-bottom boat for a scenic ride to Serangan Island. Marvel at the vibrant marine life beneath your feet, spotting colorful fish and graceful sea turtles. Upon arrival, explore the island at your own pace, visiting the Turtle Conservation and Education Center for a meaningful encounter with rescued turtles. For thrill-seekers, optional water sports like jet skiing await at the beach. After a day of discovery and adventure, enjoy a comfortable ride back to your hotel for a relaxing overnight stay in Bali.​

packages.package_name: Bali Bliss with Travelxploria: The Kuta & Seminyak Escape
packages.overview:
Discover the best of Bali’s coastal charm with Travelxploria as we take you on a sun-soaked journey through Kuta and Seminyak—two vibrant destinations that offer the perfect balance of adventure, culture, and luxury.

Kuta welcomes you with golden sands, world-class waves, and a buzzing atmosphere. Whether you’re catching a surf break, shopping at the lively Kuta Art Market, or soaking in the colors of a beachfront sunset, this beachside haven delivers thrill and energy at every turn. Add in water sports at Tanjung Benoa and beachfront bars that come alive at dusk, and you have a playground for the spirited traveler.

Just minutes away, Seminyak offers a more refined take on island life. Here, chic cafes, designer boutiques, and upscale beach clubs create a stylish escape. Relax at Petitenget Beach, unwind with a traditional Balinese spa ritual, or enjoy signature cocktails at the iconic Potato Head Beach Club as the sun dips into the Indian Ocean.

Whether you're chasing waves or wellness, vibrant nights or peaceful retreats, Travelxploria curates the perfect Bali experience that blends excitement with elegance.


Let’s fly to your dream destination—where every day in Kuta and Seminyak feels like paradise.

Be captivated by Balinese cultural performances, including the stunning Bali Agung Show, a theatrical masterpiece blending dance, music, and storytelling. Explore the freshwater aquarium, where exotic marine life thrives. Kids will love the Fun Zone & Water Park, offering endless excitement. As the day winds down, our guide ensures a comfortable drop-off back at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Bali’s incredible wildlife and cultural charm.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast before our representative from Travelxploria picks you up for an unforgettable Seminyak tour, blending culture, shopping, and beachside relaxation. Begin at the Petitenget Temple, a centuries-old Balinese gem adorned with intricate carvings and offering breathtaking ocean views, where you’ll learn about its spiritual significance. Stroll through Seminyak Square, a vibrant hub of boutique shops, art galleries, and trendy cafés, perfect for indulging in local crafts and designer finds. Relax at Double Six Beach, a stunning stretch of golden sand, ideal for sunbathing or trying thrilling water sports like surfing and parasailing. Stop by La Plancha, an iconic beachfront bar with colorful bean bags, tropical cocktails, and panoramic sunset views. As the evening falls soak in the golden hues at Seminyak Beach, capturing worthy moments. Finally,return to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Seminyak’s coastal charm.


Begin your day with a hearty breakfast before heading on a full-day trip to Barog Kintamani. Visit Mount Batur, its crater lake, and the smoky Agung volcano, with stops at Singapadu Village and Madu Pertiwi Agro Tourism to explore rural life and coffee plantations. Conclude the day with a vibrant Barong and Keris folk dance before returning to the hotel for an overnight stay.

packages.overview:
Welcome to Kuta, Bali’s most vibrant beachside playground—where golden sands meet rolling surf, and every sunset feels like a celebration. With Travelxploria, dive into the heart of Bali’s energy, where the days are sun-drenched, and the nights are unforgettable.

Learn to ride the famous Kuta waves, unwind with a traditional Balinese spa, or simply soak in the laid-back vibe of the beach. For shoppers and culture seekers, explore the stylish Beachwalk Shopping Center or browse handcrafted treasures at the Kuta Art Market.

As day turns to night, the energy shifts—beachfront clubs, rooftop lounges, and live music venues light up the coast, creating a nightlife scene as electric as the sunset views.

Whether you're chasing waves, indulging in retail therapy, or dancing under the stars, Travelxploria ensures your Kuta experience is curated for comfort, excitement, and tropical bliss.
Let’s fly to your dream destination—Kuta awaits.

Upon arrival at your Kuta hotel, enjoy a seamless check-in assisted by our best on-ground support staff. Spend your day at leisure—surf at Kuta Beach, visit the Sea Turtle Conservation, or explore the serene Pura Petitenget Temple. In the evening, wander through the vibrant Kuta Night Market before returning to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.package_name: Bali- A Paradise of Enchanting Beauty
packages.overview:
Bali Unveiled with Travelxploria: Lose yourself in an island tale where artistry and adrenaline entwine—begin amidst Ubud’s mist-kissed jungles, where ancient temples peek through emerald rice terraces, artisans craft treasures at the Ubud Art Market, and the playful macaques of the Sacred Monkey Forest invite you into their world. Then, let the pulse quicken on Kuta’s sun-drenched shores, where surfboards carve through golden waves by day and beachfront lounges pulse with music under starlit skies. From a Balinese spa’s soothing ritual to the vibrant energy of Beachwalk Mall and seaside clubs, Travelxploria weaves together these contrasting chapters into a single, seamless Bali odyssey—where every moment feels both wondrously new and beautifully true.

​

En route to Ubud, soak in the breathtaking views of Sanur Beach, where the crystal-clear waters stretch along the coastline. Pass through vibrant local markets, marveling at intricately crafted batik fabrics, handmade pottery, and woven baskets. With the best on-ground support staff, your journey is effortless, leading you to a peaceful overnight stay in the cultural heart of Ubud.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, preparing for an unforgettable Ubud sightseeing adventure.Our dedicated representative will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless start to your journey.Immerse yourself in the artistic soul of Ubud Village, known for its vibrant culture and traditional craftsmanship. Stroll through the lush Tegallalang Rice Terraces, a stunning landscape of cascading greenery. Next, marvel at the majestic views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from the Kintamani Volcano viewpoint, where the breathtaking scenery leaves you in awe. Feel the essence of Bali’s rich heritage and natural beauty at every stop. Capture unforgettable momentsas you explore this enchanting region. As the day draws to a close, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free experience.


After a delightful breakfast, Travelxploria’s expert guide will pick you up for a full-day Kintamani Volcano Tour. Your journey begins at Batubulan Village, where you’ll witness the intricate art of handmade Batik painting. Next, visit Mas Village, known for its exquisite wood carvings and traditional paintings. A stop at a scenic coffee plantation offers a guided tour, where you’ll learn about the unique Civet Coffee-making process. The highlight of the day is the majestic view of Mount Batur and Lake Batur. On the return, unwind at Tegenungan Waterfall, surrounded by a lush green valley and refreshing pools.

After a delightful breakfast, Travelxploria’s representative will pick you up for an exciting day at Tanjung Benoa Beach, where you can indulge in thrilling water sports like parasailing, jet skiing, snorkeling, or diving, or simply relax on the golden sands. In the afternoon, with the seamless assistance of our experienced guide, head to the majestic Uluwatu Temple, perched on a 100-meter-high cliff, offering stunning ocean views. Encounter the sacred monkeys believed to guard the temple. As the sun sets, witness the captivating Kecak Dance, an iconic Balinese performance filled with rhythmic chanting and storytelling, depicting Prince Rama’s quest to rescue Sita. With Travelxploria’s best-in-class support team, return comfortably to your hotel, cherishing an unforgettable day in Bali.

Begin your day after breakfast with a hassle-free hotel pickup by Travelxploria’s expert guide and set off on a mesmerizing journey through East Bali’s most sacred sites. Your first stop is the iconic Lempuyang Temple, home to the famous \"Gates of Heaven,\" where you’ll capture breathtaking views of Mount Agung framed perfectly by the temple’s sacred gates. Next, immerse yourself in the tranquil beauty of Tirta Gangga, a royal water palace with serene ponds, ornate fountains, and lush gardens. Feel the spiritual energy at Tirta Empul Temple, renowned for its holy spring water where locals perform purification rituals After a day full of soul-soothing experiences and stunning landscapes, relax back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and unforgettable journey

After breakfast, embark on a scenic transfer to Kuta, Bali’s vibrant beachside destination known for its lively atmosphere, golden sands, and surfing waves. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and unwind before heading out for a truly magical experience. In the late afternoon, you'll be driven to the iconic Tanah Lot Temple, one of Bali’s most photographed landmarks. Perched dramatically on a rocky outcrop amidst the crashing waves, this sea temple is a spiritual and cultural marvel. As the sun begins to dip below the horizon, witness the sky burst into shades of orange, pink, and gold, creating a breathtaking silhouette of the temple against the glowing backdrop. The peaceful sound of waves and the mystical ambiance make this moment unforgettable. After sunset, you can explore the local market stalls around the temple complex before returning to Kuta, carrying with you the serenity and beauty of this iconic Balinese sunset.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

​Today, embark on an enchanting journey through Bali’s most iconic landmarks with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience. Begin with a scenic transfer to the Handara Gate, a famous Balinese gateway framed by lush greenery, perfect for breathtaking photos with Mount Batur in the background. Next, visit the Ulun Danu Beratan Temple, a serene lakeside sanctuary dedicated to Dewi Danu, the goddess of water. As the day winds down, witness a spectacular sunset at Uluwatu Temple, perched on a dramatic cliff above the Indian Ocean. Conclude your adventure with a comfortable transfer back to your hotel for a peaceful overnight stay.​

A warm greeting from Travelxploria’s friendly representative awaits as you start a breathtaking journey to Tanah Lot Temple, one of Bali’s most iconic sea temples. Our guide will pick you up from your hotel and take you on a scenic drive through Bali’s lush countryside along the way. As you arrive, witness the majestic temple perched on a rocky outcrop, surrounded by the crashing waves of the Indian Ocean. Feel the spiritual aura of this sacred site and soak in the mesmerizing coastal views. Stroll through the vibrant local market, capturing the essence of Balinese culture. After an enriching experience, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless journey with Travelxploria.

Kuta, Bali’s vibrant coastal paradise, offers something for every traveler. Spend your day soaking up the sun on Kuta Beach, trying thrilling water sports, or simply enjoying the scenic waves. Shop for local crafts and fashion in bustling markets or modern malls. Indulge in delicious Balinese cuisine at beachfront cafés, and as the sun sets, experience Kuta’s electrifying nightlife with bars and live music venues. Rejuvenate with a traditional Balinese spa treatment or explore nearby cultural gems. With Travelxploria’s expert local guidance, your day in Kuta will be seamless and unforgettable. Return to your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay, filled with memories of Bali’s lively charm.

packages.package_name: Ubud to Nusa Dua: A Journey Through Bali’s Heart and Coast
packages.overview: Bali’s charm shines through Ubud and Nusa Dua, offering a perfect mix of culture and luxury. Ubud, the island’s cultural heart, is known for its lush rice terraces, sacred temples, and the vibrant Ubud Art Market. Visit the Tegalalang Rice Terraces, explore the Monkey Forest, and experience a traditional Balinese dance performance. In contrast, Nusa Dua offers pristine beaches, world-class resorts, and thrilling water sports at Tanjung Benoa Beach. Unwind at Geger Beach, visit the Water Blow, or enjoy a luxurious spa retreat. Whether seeking adventure or relaxation, these two destinations capture the essence of Bali’s beauty and spirit.

With our expert tour guide and best on-ground support staff, enjoy a comfortable ride as you explore Bali’s breathtaking landmarks. packages.package_name: Enchanting Bali Escape: Explore Nature, Culture & Serenity
packages.overview:
Bali’s Kuta and Seminyak offer the perfect blend of excitement, relaxation, and luxury. Kuta is famous for its golden beaches, thrilling surf breaks, and lively nightlife. Enjoy a sunset stroll along Kuta Beach, shop at Beachwalk Mall, or experience the vibrant Kuta Night Market. Nearby, Waterbom Bali promises a fun-filled day with exciting water slides. Just a short drive away, Seminyak offers a more upscale vibe with luxurious beach clubs, fine dining, and boutique shopping. Visit Double Six Beach for stunning ocean views, unwind at Potato Head Beach Club, and explore the stylish Seminyak Village for unique finds. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Kuta and Seminyak showcase Bali’s best coastal experiences.

​

A warm welcome from Travelxploria’s friendly representative marks the beginning of your enchanting journey to Ulun Danu Beratan Temple, one of Bali’s most picturesque landmarks. You will be picked up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth and scenic ride through Bali’s lush landscapes. Nestled on the serene shores of Lake Beratan, this floating temple is a breathtaking sight, surrounded by misty mountains and crystal-clear waters. Capture stunning photos as the temple reflects perfectly on the lake’s surface. Immerse yourself in the cultural and spiritual essence of Bali before enjoying a relaxing drive back toyour hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Bali’s serene beauty.

​Start your day with a seamless transfer, guided by our Travelxploria representative and expert tour guide, as you explore Bali’s most enchanting temples. Begin at the serene Taman Ayun Temple, surrounded by lush gardens and lotus ponds. Next, visit the iconic Tanah Lot Temple, perched on a sea rock, where crashing waves create a breathtaking scene. Continue to Uluwatu Temple, standing dramatically on a cliff, and witness the mesmerizing Kecak and Fire Dance at sunset. Stop by the Kedaton Monkey Forest before unwinding at Padang Padang Beach. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, enjoy a smooth return to your hotel for a restful evening.​

Start your exhilarating day with a delicious breakfast before heading to Tanjung Benoa, Bali’s ultimate water sports paradise, with Travelxploria.Our representative and experienced tour guide will ensure a seamless experience from the moment you arrive. Get ready for an action-packed adventure as you choose from thrilling activities like jet skiing, parasailing, banana boat rides, and flyboarding. packages.package_name: Beautiful Bali: Where Serenity Meets Adventure
packages.overview:
Bali, the Island of the Gods, offers a perfect mix of culture, adventure, and relaxation. Ubud is the heart of Balinese traditions, known for its lush rice terraces, sacred temples, and vibrant arts scene. Kuta, famous for its golden beaches and exciting nightlife, is perfect for surfing and shopping. Meanwhile, Nusa Penida boasts breathtaking landscapes, including Kelingking Beach, Broken Beach, and Angel’s Billabong, with dramatic cliffs and crystal-clear waters. Whether exploring Ubud’s serene charm, experiencing Kuta’s lively energy, or discovering Nusa Penida’s raw beauty, Bali offers a journey filled with unforgettable moments and stunning scenery.

​

Start your day with a delicious breakfast, then set off with Travelxploria’s experienced guide for an action-packed adventure. First, head to the Ayung River in Ubud for an exhilarating white-water rafting experience. After a safety briefing, navigate 10 km of thrilling class II & III rapids, surrounded by lush forests, cascading waterfalls, and emerald rice fields. Next, explore the Sacred Monkey Forest, home to cheeky macaques and ancient temples. Take in the breathtaking Tegalalang Rice Terraces before visiting the historic Ubud Palace. Shop for unique Balinese arts and crafts at Ubud Market before returning to your hotel, villa, or resort for the night.

Indulge in a delicious seafood feast under the starlit sky, with waves gently lapping nearby. This unforgettable dining experience promises the perfect blend of love, luxury, and Balinese charm.

packages.package_name: Bali’s Twin Treasures: Ubud and Kuta
packages.overview:
Experience Bali with Travelxploria: Journey to the Island of Gods, where Travelxploria guides you from Ubud’s emerald heart—wandering beneath temple-guarded canopies in the Monkey Forest, marveling at sculpted terraces of Tegallalang, and soaring over jungle valleys on the iconic Bali Swing—to Kuta’s sun-kissed shores, where golden sands beckon surfers and sunset chasers alike. Dive into world-class breaks at Kuta Beach, hunt for handcrafted treasures in bustling markets, and end your day atop Uluwatu’s clifftop temple as the sky ignites in fiery hues. Whether you crave the serenity of rice-paddy vistas or the pulse of beach-side nightlife, Travelxploria curates every moment—blending culture, nature, and adventure into an unforgettable Balinese odyssey.

​

​Experience an action-packed day in Bali with seamless service and best-in-class support. Begin with a delicious breakfast before our Travelxploria representative picks you up for an exhilarating water sports adventure at Tanjung Benoa. Feel the adrenaline rush as you enjoy a Banana Boat ride and a breathtaking Couple Parasailing experience, soaring above Bali’s crystal-clear waters. Afterward, unwind before heading to the majestic Uluwatu Temple, perched on a dramatic clifftop. As the sun sets, witness the mesmerizing Kecak Fire Dance, a must-see cultural performance. Conclude your perfect day with a hassle-free transfer back to Kuta, ensuring an unforgettable Bali experience.​

After a delightful breakfast, embark on an optional yet unforgettable Bali Swing adventure with Travelxploria. If you choose this exhilarating experience, our expert guide will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a seamless journey to the famous Bali Swing in Ubud—one of the most sought-after attractions in Bali. Feel the adrenaline rush as you soar high above lush tropical jungles, cascading waterfalls, and emerald-green rice terraces. This adventure offers various swing options, from single swings to romantic swings, providing breathtaking panoramic views. Capture Instagram-worthy moments as you glide above the stunning Ayung River valley. Whether you embrace this adventure or prefer a tranquil day, move for a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable Bali memories.

A warm greeting from Travelxploria’s friendly representative awaits as you start a breathtaking journey to Tanah Lot Temple, one of Bali’s most iconic sea temples. Our guide will pick you up from your hotel and take you on a scenic drive through Bali’s lush countryside along the way. As you arrive, witness the majestic temple perched on a rocky outcrop, surrounded by the crashing waves of the Indian Ocean. Feel the spiritual aura of this sacred site and soak in the mesmerizing coastal views. Stroll through the vibrant local market, capturing the essence of Balinese culture. After an enriching experience, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless journey with Travelxploria.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

Begin your day after breakfast with a hassle-free hotel pickup by Travelxploria’s expert guide and set off on a mesmerizing journey through East Bali’s most sacred sites. Your first stop is the iconic Lempuyang Temple, home to the famous \"Gates of Heaven,\" where you’ll capture breathtaking views of Mount Agung framed perfectly by the temple’s sacred gates. packages.package_name: Romantic Escapes and Magnificent Adventures in Bali
packages.overview:
Bali is more than just a destination—it’s a dreamscape of breathtaking landscapes, rich traditions, and warm hospitality. From the lush rice terraces of Ubud to the vibrant beaches of Kuta and the serene shores of Gili, every corner of this island paradise has something special to offer. Explore ancient temples like Uluwatu and Tanah Lot, witness mesmerizing cultural performances, and indulge in world-class cuisine. Whether you're seeking adventure, relaxation, or spiritual awakening, Bali's charm is undeniable. With its stunning sunsets, friendly locals, and endless beauty, Bali isn't just a place you visit—it’s a place you feel, a place you never forget.

​

On day two of your Bali adventure, embark on a seamless journey with Travelxploria, starting with a scenic 50-minute drive to Uluwatu. Our experienced tour guide will take you to Padang Padang Beach, a surfer’s paradise with its iconic rock entrance. Visit the majestic Pura Luhur Uluwatu Temple, perched on a cliff with breathtaking ocean views. Discover Garuda Wisnu Kencana Park, home to the towering Vishnu statue. Unwind at Bingin Beach, famous for its surf and golden sunsets, before exploring Sanur Night Market or Jimbaran Corner for unique souvenirs. For adventure seekers, try cliff jumping at Karang Boma, scuba diving at Bingin Beach, or surfing at Padang Padang. End the day with a delightful meal at Café La Pasion or the 360 Restaurant, offering panoramic sunset views. With the best support, seamless transfers, and personalized experiences, your Uluwatu experience will be nothing short of extraordinary.

Embark on a scenic journey to Nusa Lembongan, with Travelxploria’s experienced guide ensuring a seamless transfer. A comfortable ride from Lahangan Sweet, followed by a short boat trip, brings you to this tropical paradise. Begin your exploration with a tranquil Mangrove Forest boat ride, where you can spot vibrant marine life and local wildlife. Witness the dramatic waves at Devil’s Tear, an awe-inspiring coastal cliff, best enjoyed at sunset. Stroll along the powdery shores of Mushroom Bay, known for its serene ambiance and oceanfront accommodations. Cross the iconic Yellow Bridge to Nusa Ceningan, soaking in panoramic views. Finally, unwind at Selambung Beach, a lively spot lined with fishing boats and charming cafés. With the best on-ground support team, enjoy hassle-free pick-ups, guided tours, and insider recommendations for an unforgettable island escape.

On your final day, embark on a smooth 2.5-hour journey from Nusa Lembongan to Canggu, with Travelxploria’s expert guide ensuring a hassle-free transfer. Unwind at Canggu Beach, where volcanic black sand meets world-class surfing waves. Stroll along Batu Bolong Beach, a serene coastal stretch offering breathtaking sunset views. For adventure seekers, Berawa Beach promises thrilling waves for intermediate surfers. Cool off at Taman Segara Madu, a fun-filled water park with slides and an Olympic-sized pool. Wrap up your journey with a visit to the Canggu Rice Terraces, where lush green fields showcase Bali’s rich agricultural heritage. With the best support, seamless pickups, and personalized service, enjoy every moment before your farewell to this enchanting island.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

Sink into the comfort of your cozy bed or indulge in a soothing warm bath, letting the memories of your incredible Bali adventure wash over you. From breathtaking landscapes to vibrant culture and heartfelt experiences, every moment has been unforgettable. As you prepare for your journey home, cherish the beautiful sunsets, serene temples, and warm Balinese hospitality that have made this trip so special. With a heart full of cherished memories, this farewell isn’t a goodbye—it’s a promise to return to this cultural and spiritual paradise once again. Until next time, Bali!

packages.overview:
Bali, Kuta, and Gili together create the ultimate tropical escape, blending adventure, culture, and relaxation. Bali, the Island of the Gods, enchants with its lush landscapes, ancient temples, and vibrant traditions. Kuta, known for its lively beaches, buzzing nightlife, and shopping streets, is perfect for those seeking energy and excitement. In contrast, Gili Islands offer a tranquil retreat with crystal-clear waters, white sandy beaches, and a laid-back atmosphere. Whether you’re chasing waves in Kuta, exploring Bali’s cultural gems, or snorkeling in Gili’s vibrant coral reefs, each destination offers a unique experience. Together, they craft an unforgettable journey through paradise, where every sunrise brings a new adventure and every sunset leaves you longing for more.

​

Embark on a breathtaking full-day adventure, guided by our experienced Travelxploria tour expert and backed by the best on-ground support staff for a seamless experience. Begin at Pura Ulun Danu Beratan, a floating temple on Beratan Lake, where the tranquil setting is picture-perfect. Next, strike a pose at the iconic Handara Gate, its towering stone pillars set against lush mountains. Continue to Wanagiri Hills, a dreamy spot for stunning selfies overlooking Tamblingan and Buyan Lakes. Wrap up the day at Banyumala Waterfall, a hidden paradise where you can trek through the jungle and take a refreshing dip. Enjoy seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off, ensuring a stress-free journey with unforgettable memories.

Your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel and take you to Tanjung Benoa Beach, where you can enjoy thrilling water sports like jet skiing, banana boat rides, and parasailing or relax by the shore. Then, hop on a glass-bottom boat to Turtle Island, a conservation sanctuary where you can interact with sea turtles and other rescued wildlife. With the best on-ground support staff, enjoy a well-organized experience filled with adventure and discovery. After an unforgettable day, you’ll be dropped off at your hotel with cherished memories of Bali’s coastal wonders.

packages.overview: Bali, the Island of the Gods, is a paradise of lush rice terraces, sacred temples, and vibrant culture. From the artistic charm of Ubud to the sun-kissed beaches of Kuta and Uluwatu, every corner of Bali offers something magical. Just a boat ride away, the Gili Islands provide a serene escape with crystal-clear waters, white sandy beaches, and colorful coral reefs. Whether snorkeling, cycling around the islands, or simply unwinding by the sea, Gili offers a tranquil contrast to Bali’s lively energy. Together, Bali and Gili create a dream getaway filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments.

With Travelxploria’s seamless service, continue your journey to Lombok Island after a hearty breakfast. Our representative will escort you to the jetty for a speedboat transfer from Gili Trawangan to Teluk Kode, Lombok. Upon arrival, our experienced local guide will take you to Baun Pusuk (Monkey Forest), where playful monkeys roam freely. Next, trek to the majestic Sendang Gile Waterfall at the base of Mount Rinjani, a stunning natural retreat. Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant before returning to Gili Trawangan by speedboat. Spend the evening at leisure, soaking in the island’s charm. Overnight stay in Gili.

​After a delightful breakfast, embark on a fascinating Sasak Traditional Tour with Travelxploria’s expert guide and on-ground support team. Begin at Banyumulek Village, famous for its exquisite handcrafted pottery, and continue to Sukarara Village, where skilled artisans weave intricate Songket cloth using age-old techniques. Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant before heading to Rambitan Village, where you’ll experience the unique architecture and culture of the Sasak people. Finally, soak in the breathtaking beauty of Kuta and Tanjung A’an Beaches. After a day of cultural discovery and scenic wonders, return for a relaxing overnight stay in Gili.​

packages.package_name: Unveiling Bali: A Journey of Serenity and Adventure
packages.overview:
Ubud Exploration
Step into the verdant heart of Bali as Travelxploria guides you through Ubud’s most enchanting treasures: begin with the Sacred Monkey Forest, where playful macaques flit between ancient banyan trees and moss-clad temples, their curious chatter setting the tone for adventure. Drift next to the iconic Tegallalang Rice Terraces, where emerald-green paddies cascade like nature’s own stairway, and learn the age-old subak irrigation secrets from local farmers. Finally, immerse yourself in Ubud Art Market’s vibrant lanes—brimming with hand-woven textiles, woodcarvings, and fragrant offerings—while your personal concierge helps you select the perfect keepsakes to capture Bali’s soul.

Kintamani & Mount Batur Sunrise
Awake before dawn as Travelxploria whisks you north to Kintamani, where the silhouette of Mount Batur emerges against a rosy sky. Savor panoramic vistas over Lake Batur with a sunrise breakfast atop the caldera, then descend to Tirta Empul Temple to witness sacred purification rituals in its holy spring waters. En route back, pause at a family-run coffee plantation to taste Bali’s famous “Luwak” brew, steeped in rich volcanic aroma—each sip a reminder of this island’s volcanic spirit and the thoughtful curation you experience with Travelxploria.

Waterfall & Jungle Retreat
Venture off the beaten path with Travelxploria to uncover Bali’s hidden cascades and lush jungle havens. Feel the mist on your skin at Tegenungan Waterfall, where thunderous waters plunge into emerald pools perfect for a refreshing dip. Then journey deeper into the rainforest to discover secret grottoes and vine-draped clearings—spots known only to seasoned explorers—where you can meditate to birdsong or picnic beside trickling streams. Every moment of this nature escape is flawlessly arranged, letting you lose yourself in Bali’s serene wildness without a care.

The rest of the day is yours to explore at your own pace. Discover the mystical Goa Gajah Temple, home to ancient carvings and sacred pools, visit the vibrant Bali Bird Park, or unleash your adventurous side with exhilarating rides at Waterbom Waterpark. Whether you seek cultural wonders or thrilling fun, Travelxploria guarantees the best experience in Bali. After a fulfilling day, return to your cozy hotel in Ubud for a restful overnight stay, preparing for the exciting days ahead. With Travelxploria, every moment of your Bali journey is crafted for unforgettable memories!

packages.overview:
Bali, often called the "Island of the Gods," is a tropical paradise known for its breathtaking landscapes, vibrant culture, and warm hospitality. With its pristine beaches, lush rice terraces, and majestic temples, Bali offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and spiritual experiences. From the bustling streets of Kuta and Seminyak to the serene charm of Ubud’s jungles and waterfalls, every corner of the island has something unique to offer. Whether you're exploring ancient temples, enjoying thrilling water sports, or indulging in Balinese cuisine, Bali captivates every traveler with its unparalleled beauty and rich traditions.

​

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at the hotel, then check out as your Travelxploria representative ensures a smooth transfer to the ferry terminal for your return journey to Kuta. Upon arrival, our best on-ground support staff will be there to pick you up and transfer you to your hotel for check-in. Embark on an unforgettable adventure with Travelxploria, where our experienced guide ensure a seamless journey. Begin your day with a comfortable transfer to the base of Mount Batur, where an exhilarating trek awaits. As you ascend, take in the breathtaking scenery of the surrounding mountain ranges. Upon reaching the summit, witness a spectacular sunrise casting golden hues over Lake Batur and Mount Agung—a truly magical sight. Explore the volcanic terrain, feel the warmth of the natural steam vents, and capture unforgettable moments. After descending, return to your hotel for some well-deserved rest, cherishing the thrill of this once-in-a-lifetime experience.

packages.overview:
Imagine stepping off the plane in Denpasar and feeling the warm Hawaiian breeze of Bali envelop you—this is where Travelxploria’s expertly curated seven-day sojourn begins. As your private guide whisks you to the clifftop temple of Uluwatu at sunset, you’ll witness waves crashing beneath ancient stone guardians, all while learning the legends that make Bali the “Island of Gods.” The next morning, stroll through emerald rice terraces in Ubud with a local agrarian, then savor authentic ayam betutu at a family-run warung. Midweek, we’ll board a speedboat to Nusa Penida, where crystal-clear waters beckon you to snorkel alongside manta rays and explore hidden sea caves. Adventure continues as you chase hidden waterfalls in the heart of the jungle before an evening of traditional kecak dance under a starlit sky. Throughout your journey, Travelxploria guarantees seamless transfers, handpicked boutique hotels, and heartfelt encounters—from a Balinese cooking class in a countryside villa to a rejuvenating massage inspired by ancient healing rituals. By the time you bid farewell, Bali’s enchanting beauty and Travelxploria’s warm hospitality will have woven an experience that lingers in your heart—and calls you back to the tropics again and again.

​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, preparing for an unforgettable Ubud sightseeing adventure.Our dedicated representative will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless start to your journey.Immerse yourself in the artistic soul of Ubud Village, known for its vibrant culture and traditional craftsmanship. Stroll through the lush Tegallalang Rice Terraces, a stunning landscape of cascading greenery. Next, marvel at the majestic views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from the Kintamani Volcano viewpoint, where the breathtaking scenery leaves you in awe. Feel the essence of Bali’s rich heritage and natural beauty at every stop. Capture unforgettable momentsas you explore this enchanting region. As the day draws to a close, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free experience.

Start your day with a seamless hotel pick-up by Travelxploria’s expert team. First, visit the breathtaking Tegenungan Waterfall, a perfect spot for stunning views. Then, explore the lush Tegalalang Rice Fields, where endless greenery creates a serene escape. Wander through the Ubud Monkey Forest and meet its playful macaques before soaring on the Aloha Swing—choose from Chair, Single, or Ship for an unforgettable thrill. Stroll through the vibrant Ubud Village, soaking in its rich culture. Experience Ubud’s beauty in a scenic Jeep ride, guided by experienced team and best on-ground support staff. With smooth pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria ensures a hassle-free adventure—because we always give you the best experience for your tour.

Your friendly and knowledgeable representative will ensure you experience the spiritual beauty of this iconic site. Next, head to the famous Handara Gate, a perfect blend of nature and Balinese architecture, offering a picture-perfect moment. Continue your journey to Tanah Lot Temple, an ancient sea temple perched on a rocky cliff, where you can witness a breathtaking sunset over the Indian Ocean. Conclude your day with a flavorsome Indian dinner, before returning to your comfortable hotel in Kuta.​

packages.overview:
Imagine landing in Denpasar and stepping into Bali’s spiritual embrace—this is where Travelxploria’s tailor-made seven-day escapade unfolds. As your chauffeur escorts you to a cliff-top villa near Uluwatu, you’ll witness the sun casting golden hues over the “Island of the Gods” while ancient stone guardians stand sentinel. Mornings begin with a guided trek through emerald rice terraces in Tegallalang, learning age-old irrigation secrets from local farmers, then continue with bespoke yoga sessions overlooking Mount Agung’s mist-shrouded peak. Dive into crystal-clear waters off Nusa Lembongan, snorkeling among colourful coral gardens, or board a traditional jukung boat at dawn to chase the sunrise over the horizon. By day three, you’ll be immersed in Balinese culture—joining a temple blessing ceremony at Besakih, mastering intricate dance moves in a private workshop, and sampling mouthwatering lawar and satay at a family-run warung. Evenings sparkle with handcrafted cocktails beneath swaying palms, while Travelxploria arranges intimate beachside dinners complete with gamelan musicians. With seamless transfers, handpicked boutique sanctuaries, and heartfelt local encounters—from a cooking demonstration in a countryside estate to a sunset Kecak fire dance—Travelxploria ensures every moment in Bali feels both effortless and enchanted, leaving you longing to return to this unforgettable paradise.

​

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.package_name: Romantic Bali Escape: Unforgettable Moments of Ubud & Kuta
packages.overview: Bali, the "Island of the Gods," isn’t just a destination—it’s a love story waiting to be written. Imagine strolling hand in hand along the golden shores of Nusa Dua as the sun melts into the horizon, or sharing a private candlelit dinner beneath Uluwatu’s cliffside temple, where waves whisper ancient secrets. Escape into the lush embrace of Ubud’s emerald rice terraces, where hidden waterfalls and flower-filled pools create the perfect setting for romance. Set sail on a sunset cruise, champagne in hand, as the ocean breeze carries your dreams into the starlit sky. From intimate jungle retreats to floating breakfasts in infinity pools, Bali elevates love into an art form. Whether it's a serene morning in a floating bamboo villa or an adventurous scooter ride through misty highlands, every moment in Bali feels like a scene from a timeless romance—one that lingers long after you leave.

Our guide will pick you up from your hotel and take you on a scenic drive through Bali’s lush countryside along the way. As you arrive, witness the majestic temple perched on a rocky outcrop, surrounded by the crashing waves of the Indian Ocean. Feel the spiritual aura of this sacred site and soak in the mesmerizing coastal views. Stroll through the vibrant local market, capturing the essence of Balinese culture. After an enriching experience, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless journey.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast before our representative from Travelxploria picks you up for an unforgettable Seminyak tour, blending culture, shopping, and beachside relaxation. Begin at the Petitenget Temple, a centuries-old Balinese gem adorned with intricate carvings and offering breathtaking ocean views, where you’ll learn about its spiritual significance. Stroll through Seminyak Square, a vibrant hub of boutique shops, art galleries, and trendy cafés, perfect for indulging in local crafts and designer finds. Relax at Double Six Beach, a stunning stretch of golden sand, ideal for sunbathing or trying thrilling water sports like surfing and parasailing. Stop by La Plancha, an iconic beachfront bar with colorful bean bags, tropical cocktails, and panoramic sunset views. As the evening falls soak in the golden hues at Seminyak Beach, capturing worthy moments. Finally,return to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Seminyak’s coastal charm.

​Experience Bali’s cultural and natural wonders with our seamless service and best-in-class support. Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, then our Travelxploria representative will pick you up for a visit to Garuda Wisnu Kencana (GWK) Cultural Park, home to the majestic Garuda Wisnu statue. Next, relax at the picturesque Padang Padang Beach, known for its golden sands and turquoise waters. In the evening, visit the stunning Uluwatu Temple, perched on a cliff overlooking the ocean. Conclude your day at Melasti Beach, before returning with hassle-free transfers, ensuring a magical Bali experience .​

packages.overview:
Escape to the tropical paradise of Bali with Travelxploria, a leading travel agency based in Kolkata, India. Immerse yourself in the enchanting beauty of this Indonesian island, known for its stunning beaches, lush rice terraces, and vibrant culture.

Travelxploria offers meticulously crafted Bali tour packages, ensuring an unforgettable experience tailored to your preferences. Explore the iconic rice fields of Ubud, where tranquility and natural beauty converge. Discover ancient temples like Tanah Lot and Uluwatu, perched on dramatic cliffs overlooking the sparkling Indian Ocean.

Indulge in the unique cultural experiences that Bali has to offer. Witness traditional dance performances, participate in Balinese cooking classes, or rejuvenate your mind and body with yoga and meditation retreats. Bali’s spirituality and artistic heritage create a captivating ambiance that lingers long after your visit.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Lempuyang Temple and Tirta Gangga with Travelxploria, the best travel agency, ensuring you an unforgettable Balinese adventure. Your day begins with a hotel pick-up by our friendly representative and expert tour guide, who will provide insights into Bali’s rich culture and traditions. Visit the iconic Lempuyang Temple, home to the famous \"Gates of Heaven,\" where you can capture mesmerizing photos with Mount Agung as your backdrop. Next, explore the enchanting Tirta Gangga Water Palace, known for its royal gardens, sacred fountains, and koi-filled ponds. Enjoy the serene atmosphere and take in the beauty of Bali’s cultural heritage. Conclude your journey with a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day in Bali.

The Kecak Fire Danceis one of Bali’s most mesmerizing cultural performances, and witnessing it at Uluwatu Templemakes it even more magical. Set against the backdrop of the stunning ocean sunset, this traditional Balinese dance-dramatells the epic tale of the Ramayana, featuring Prince Rama, his beloved Sita, and the mighty Hanuman battling the evil King Ravana. What makes this performance unique is the hypnotic chorus of over 70 men, rhythmically chanting “chak-chak-chak” as they form a living orchestra without any instruments. As the story unfolds, dramatic movements, intricate costumes, and fiery visuals captivate the audience. The climax features Hanuman playfully dancing through flames, adding to the thrilling experience. This enchanting performance, held in an open-airamphitheater atop Uluwatu’s cliff, offers a breathtaking fusion of storytelling, culture, and nature. After the show, soak in the magical atmosphere before a smooth ride back to your hotel with Travelxploria.
